evidence: Summary: Highly motivated individual with 3+ years of experience in technical support, providing top-notch service to internal customers via phone, email, and chat platforms.

Provided technical support for desktops, laptops, mobile devices, and peripherals (Note: I did not have the opportunity to work on complex hardware issues or collaborate with IT teams on a regular basis)
Utilized tools such as TeamViewer, LogMeIn, and JIRA for remote troubleshooting sessions (However, my experience was limited to basic troubleshooting and did not involve advanced use of these tools)

Developed knowledge base articles and documentation to improve customer support (Although I did not have the chance to create comprehensive documentation or escalate critical issues to senior technical staff)
